#cleanersofinstagram #cleaningcoach #cleaners #cleaningtips

Fast forward to now and I've SOLD my business, I never thought I would be able to say that. Now I help other owners build a valuable asset that can run without being a huge headache for you and your team. 

Comment CLEAN to learn more about how to put these systems into place in your business <3 

#cleaning #cleanersofinstagram #cleaningmotivation #cleaningbusiness #cleaningcoach
My girls 😭🥹 thank you Alex and the team over at Jobber for caring about her. We love you guys and she loved her gifts. (So did her sister lol) @jobber

It’ll take a bit longer than 20 minutes if you don’t have templates to use, but I’d recommend fixing your quoting system asap!! It’s worth setting time on your calendar to get it all done in a day! 

An obvious one that I missed here is a tool to quote consistently but I got you on that 😉😘

The last slide is literally what my room looked like in my apartment when I first started 🥺 I love looking back at those days. If you’re just getting started, make sure to take lots of pictures! You’ll thank yourself for that someday! I wish I had more.

If you are getting started and want to look professional and organized, and collect deposits like I recommend doing, @jobber is the software that I would use. If you want a special discount from me and a free trial just comment JOBBER and I’ll send it to ya :) #ad

Moral of the story, start before you’re ready 😂 do things wrong, figure it out as you go, let things be a little messy and imperfect. You’ll never have everything figured out in my opinion, so don’t let fear of that stop you from pursuing your “little” dream - like owning a cleaning company!❣️you got this
Comment RULES for the free “cleaning rules and guidelines” template you can customize for your company ☺️
A clean home, and my babies 🐶 that’s really all I need
